## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (if frontend changed)
- [ ] No `exec("kubectl")` / `exec("helm")` introduced
- [ ] No secrets or instance-specific values committed
- [ ] Comments / docs are in English
